name: Cinder Creatures
description: Cinder monster-catcher pack for GB Studio 4.x v0.24: Gym leaders renamed off Meridian's internal agent set — they now read as ember-trade roles in the Cinder world. AUDITOR PYRE (LOGIC, was ARCHIVIST EOS), KEEPER KILN (MEM, was WARDEN SOMA), FOREMAN HUSKE (PROC, was CONDUCTOR TEMPO), CARRIER WICK (DATA, was COURIER HERMES), STOKER HEARTH (CORE, was FOREMAN ATLAS). Each leader's locked / open / boast / send-out / victory / badge / next-leader lines rewritten in fire & ember vocabulary; trigger names, gym signs, TRAINER_CHALLENGE fields, and EVENT_CC_BADGE_UNLOCK leaderName fields all updated. Carries forward v0.21's branded title + player-name entry, v0.20's Achievements page, v0.19's Codex tab, v0.18's VOID final fight, v0.17 CORE / v0.16 DATA / v0.15 PROC / v0.14 MEM / v0.12 LOGIC gyms, v0.13's catch loop, v0.11's USB-driven encounter pool, 56 cinderized creature sprites, 5-type chart. Adventure Plus + Advanced Dialogue 2 + Advanced Menu 2 plugins also installed in this build for richer UX.
author: Meridian (for Joel Kometz)
